2026-04-21T23:46:45.7660810Z [36;1m# Derive GH_HOST from GITHUB_SERVER_URL so the gh CLI targets the correct[0m
2026-04-21T23:46:45.7661909Z [36;1m# GitHub instance (GHES/GHEC). On github.com this is a harmless no-op.[0m
